@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@ {"id":"bd-2txr","title":"E2E Tests: History UI Components","description":"## Task Add UI-level E2E tests for the Recently Viewed History feature. ## Context The API-level E2E tests exist (e2e/history/recently-viewed.spec.ts) but UI component tests are missing. ## Test Scenarios 1. **RecentlyViewedSidebar Component** - Sidebar displays recent items - Clear history button works - Items link to correct pages - Empty state displays correctly - Loading state shows correctly 2. **History Page (/history)** - Page loads and displays items - Search/filter works - Clear all history works - Timestamps display correctly - Links navigate correctly 3. **History Tracking Integration** - Viewing a prompt adds to history - Search queries are tracked - Deduplication prevents rapid duplicates - Items appear in sidebar after viewing ## Files to Modify - e2e/history/recently-viewed.spec.ts (add UI tests) - e2e/lib/history-helpers.ts (add UI selectors) ## Success Criteria - All sidebar interactions tested - History page fully tested - Integration with tracking verified","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CoralStar","created_at":"2026-01-21T17:45:40.323914674Z","created_by":"CoralStar","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:54:46.005730906Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T17:54:46.005649042Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":13,"issue_id":"bd-2txr","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implementation complete: - Added 16 new UI tests (34 total including API tests) - History Page UI tests: header, empty state, items display, search filter, clear button, navigation - RecentlyViewedSidebar tests: title, empty state, history link, items display, 8-item limit - History Tracking Integration tests: cross-page sync, clear sync, search query display - Updated history-helpers.ts with better UI selectors for sidebar and history page - 68 total tests (34 × 2 browser configs: chromium + Mobile Chrome)","created_at":"2026-01-21T17:54:39Z"}]} {"id":"bd-3jtd","title":"EPIC: World-Class UI/UX Polish - Mobile & Desktop Optimization","description":"## Overview Hyper-optimize both mobile and desktop UI/UX to achieve world-class visual appeal, polish, and slickness following best practices from industry leaders like Stripe. ## Completed Work 1. ✅ Fixed critical mobile button text truncation in PromptDetailModal - Restructured to mobile-first approach with full-width primary action - Secondary actions in 2x2 grid that never truncates ## Mobile Optimization Goals - Ensure all touch targets are 44px minimum (iOS HIG standard) - Proper safe area insets for notched devices - Bottom-sheet interactions for modals - Optimized category filter horizontal scrolling - Touch-friendly gestures with haptic feedback ## Desktop Optimization Goals - Refined hover states and micro-interactions - Proper keyboard navigation - Consistent typography and spacing - Premium shadow and elevation design - Stripe-level polish on all interactive elements ## Components to Audit - [x] PromptDetailModal - Fixed - [x] Button component - Already well-designed - [x] BottomSheet - Well-designed with safe area support - [x] SpotlightSearch - Well-designed with mobile-first approach - [x] Nav - Good touch targets - [x] BottomNav - Good mobile design - [x] PromptCard - Good Stripe-inspired design ## Status Initial critical bug fixed. Full audit shows components are already well-designed following mobile-first principles.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-21T20:27:47.367791503Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T20:28:41.377830454Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T20:28:41.377778706Z","close_reason":"Completed UI/UX audit. Fixed critical mobile button truncation. All other components already follow mobile-first best practices with proper touch targets, safe area support, and Stripe-inspired design.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} -{"id":"bd-3ttk","title":"Port jfp CLI to Rust","notes":"Reviewed/expanded EXISTING_JFP_STRUCTURE.md (safe skill id regex, variable parsing limits, login device-flow timing, sync merge details, serve --config, update-cli asset/verify details). Added library decisions to PLAN_TO_PORT_JFP_TO_RUST.md and optional/deferred libs in PROPOSED_ARCHITECTURE.md. Added JSONL path note in SYNC_STRATEGY.md.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"VioletHill","created_at":"2026-01-21T03:10:58.492607101Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T04:55:58.721711728Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} +{"id":"bd-3ttk","title":"Port jfp CLI to Rust","notes":"Taking over from VioletHill (8 days stale). Reviewing Phase 1 planning docs and continuing work.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"CloudySparrow","created_at":"2026-01-21T03:10:58.492607101Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T02:08:04.216975866Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} {"id":"bd-cry3","title":"CRITICAL: Mobile button text truncation in prompt detail modal","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-21T20:22:11.539628983Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T20:26:49.820782671Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T20:26:49.820733619Z","close_reason":"Fixed mobile button truncation - restructured to use full-width primary action + 2x2 grid for secondary actions","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-02u","title":"Build ChangelogAccordion for prompt detail pages","description":"**Details:** - Shows version history when prompt.changelog exists - Accordion expansion (collapsed by default) - Lists changes chronologically (newest first) - Version, date, and change description per entry **Changelog Type (in types.ts):** ```typescript interface PromptChange { version: string; date: string; changes: string[]; } // On Prompt interface: changelog?: PromptChange[]; ``` **Implementation:** ```typescript // apps/web/src/components/changelog-accordion.tsx interface ChangelogAccordionProps { changelog: PromptChange[]; } export function ChangelogAccordion({ changelog }: ChangelogAccordionProps) { const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false); if (!changelog?.length) return null; return (
{expanded && (
    {changelog.map((entry) => (
  • {entry.version} {entry.date}
      {entry.changes.map((change, i) => (
    • {change}
      • ))}
    • ))}
)}
); } ``` **Location:** apps/web/src/components/changelog-accordion.tsx **Reasoning:** Changelogs build trust and help users understand prompt evolution. Accordion keeps the UI clean while making history accessible.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T05:35:24.004177827Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T21:50:21.229495631Z","closed_at":"2026-01-10T21:50:21.229495631Z","close_reason":"Created ChangelogAccordion with collapsible UI, type-specific icons/colors, and timeline styling.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-06hp","title":"Task: Generate combined coverage report","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T22:49:56.733833988Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T00:48:14.075783682Z","closed_at":"2026-01-11T00:48:14.075783682Z","close_reason":"Implemented merge-coverage.ts script, added coverage:all and coverage:merge scripts to package.json, updated CI to generate and upload combined coverage report","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-06hp","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-vyjo","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T22:57:08.032982405Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}

@@ -22,13 +22,27 @@ jobs:
   sync-aliases:
     name: Sync Production Aliases
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    env:
+      BUN_VERSION: "1.2"
     # Only run if CI succeeded (or manual/scheduled trigger)
     if: ${{ github.event_name != 'workflow_run' || github.event.workflow_run.conclusion == 'success' }}
     timeout-minutes: 5
 
     steps:
-      - name: Install Vercel CLI
-        run: npm install -g vercel@latest
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Ensure Vercel token configured
+        env:
+          VERCEL_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          if [ -z "${VERCEL_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
+            echo "::error::Missing VERCEL_TOKEN secret. Alias sync cannot run without it."
+            echo "::error::Add VERCEL_TOKEN in repo secrets (Vercel > Account Tokens)."
+            exit 1
+          fi
 
       - name: Wait for Vercel deployment
         # Give Vercel time to complete the deployment after CI
@@ -42,7 +56,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           # Get the current production deployment for jeffreysprompts.com
           # The inspect output contains a line like: "url    https://jeffreysprompts-xxx.vercel.app"
-          PROD_INFO=$(vercel inspect jeffreysprompts.com --token "$VERCEL_TOKEN" --scope dicklesworthstones-projects 2>&1 || true)
+          PROD_INFO=$(bunx vercel inspect jeffreysprompts.com --token "$VERCEL_TOKEN" --scope dicklesworthstones-projects 2>&1 || true)
 
           # Extract URL - try multiple patterns for robustness
           PROD_URL=$(echo "$PROD_INFO" | grep -E 'url\s+https://' | head -1 | awk '{print $2}' | sed 's|https://||')
@@ -57,13 +71,50 @@ jobs:
           echo "prod_url=$PROD_URL" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
           echo "Production URL: $PROD_URL"
 
+      - name: Get pro alias deployment URL
+        id: get-pro
+        env:
+          VERCEL_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          PRO_INFO=$(bunx vercel inspect pro.jeffreysprompts.com --token "$VERCEL_TOKEN" --scope dicklesworthstones-projects 2>&1 || true)
+          PRO_URL=$(echo "$PRO_INFO" | grep -E 'url\s+https://' | head -1 | awk '{print $2}' | sed 's|https://||')
+          if [ -z "$PRO_URL" ]; then
+            echo "::warning::Could not determine pro alias target from vercel inspect"
+          else
+            echo "Pro alias URL: $PRO_URL"
+          fi
+          echo "pro_url=$PRO_URL" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+
+      - name: Check alias target alignment
+        id: check-alias
+        run: |
+          PROD_URL="${{ steps.get-prod.outputs.prod_url }}"
+          PRO_URL="${{ steps.get-pro.outputs.pro_url }}"
+
+          if [ -z "$PRO_URL" ]; then
+            echo "aligned=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "reason=pro_url_missing" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            exit 0
+          fi
+
+          if [ "$PROD_URL" = "$PRO_URL" ]; then
+            echo "aligned=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "reason=alias_match" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          else
+            echo "aligned=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "reason=alias_mismatch" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "::warning::Alias mismatch: pro -> $PRO_URL (expected $PROD_URL)"
+          fi
+
       - name: Check CSS chunk alignment
         id: check-css
         run: |
           # Get CSS chunks from both domains
           MAIN_CSS=$(curl -sf "https://jeffreysprompts.com" | grep -oE '/_next/static/chunks/[^"]+\.css' | sort -u | head -5)
           PRO_CSS=$(curl -sf "https://pro.jeffreysprompts.com" | grep -oE '/_next/static/chunks/[^"]+\.css' | sort -u | head -5)
 
+          ALIAS_ALIGNED="${{ steps.check-alias.outputs.aligned }}"
+
           echo "Main site CSS chunks:"
           echo "$MAIN_CSS"
           echo ""
@@ -78,15 +129,22 @@ jobs:
 
           if [ -z "$PRO_CSS" ]; then
             echo "::warning::Could not extract CSS chunks from pro site - may need re-aliasing"
-            echo "aligned=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "css_aligned=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
           elif [ "$MAIN_CSS" = "$PRO_CSS" ]; then
-            echo "aligned=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "css_aligned=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
             echo "::notice::CSS chunks are aligned - no action needed"
           else
-            echo "aligned=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "css_aligned=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
             echo "::warning::CSS chunks differ - will re-alias pro subdomain"
           fi
 
+          # Final decision: alias must match AND CSS must match
+          if [ "$ALIAS_ALIGNED" = "true" ] && [ "$PRO_CSS" = "$MAIN_CSS" ]; then
+            echo "aligned=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          else
+            echo "aligned=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          fi
+
       - name: Sync pro subdomain alias
         if: steps.check-css.outputs.aligned == 'false'
         env:
@@ -95,7 +153,7 @@ jobs:
           PROD_URL="${{ steps.get-prod.outputs.prod_url }}"
           echo "Aliasing $PROD_URL to pro.jeffreysprompts.com..."
 
-          vercel alias set "$PROD_URL" pro.jeffreysprompts.com \
+          bunx vercel alias set "$PROD_URL" pro.jeffreysprompts.com \
             --token "$VERCEL_TOKEN" \
             --scope dicklesworthstones-projects
 
@@ -107,6 +165,15 @@ jobs:
           # Wait for CDN propagation
           sleep 15
 
+          # Verify alias target matches prod
+          PROD_URL="${{ steps.get-prod.outputs.prod_url }}"
+          PRO_INFO=$(bunx vercel inspect pro.jeffreysprompts.com --scope dicklesworthstones-projects 2>&1 || true)
+          PRO_URL=$(echo "$PRO_INFO" | grep -E 'url\s+https://' | head -1 | awk '{print $2}' | sed 's|https://||')
+          if [ -n "$PRO_URL" ] && [ "$PRO_URL" != "$PROD_URL" ]; then
+            echo "::error::Alias verification failed - pro still points to $PRO_URL (expected $PROD_URL)"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
           # Verify CSS chunks now match
           MAIN_CSS=$(curl -sf "https://jeffreysprompts.com" | grep -oE '/_next/static/chunks/[^"]+\.css' | sort -u | head -5)
           PRO_CSS=$(curl -sf "https://pro.jeffreysprompts.com" | grep -oE '/_next/static/chunks/[^"]+\.css' | sort -u | head -5)

@@ -80,6 +80,8 @@ A GitHub Action (`.github/workflows/sync-vercel-aliases.yml`) automatically sync
 - Runs every 6 hours as a safety net
 - Checks CSS chunk alignment between domains
 - Re-aliases pro subdomain if they differ
+- **Hard-fails if `VERCEL_TOKEN` is missing** (so drift never goes unnoticed)
+- **Verifies alias target alignment** (pro alias must point to the same deployment URL as the main site)
 
 **One-time setup required:**
 1. Generate a Vercel token: https://vercel.com/account/tokens
